narrative:
Precinct Fairview/Oxford (precinct in Guernsey County) has 452 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.5 percentage points.
